metadata.title: Medical Synonym Lists from Medieval Provence
metadata.description: Extracted entries from Shem Tov ben Isaac of Tortosa, Sefer ha-Shimmush Book 29, and supplementary sources

sources.title: Sefer Almansur (Medical Glossaries in the Hebrew Tradition)
Latin/Italo-Romance Glossary, Ms. Oxford Bodleian Opp. 688
Arabic-Romance Glossaries in Hebrew MSS (Vatican Library)

sefer_almansur.botanical: Dryopteris filix mas [L.] Schott and Var.
i.e., black hellebore [Helleborus niger] or white hellebore [Veratrum album and Var.]

sefer_almansur.english: Root of the long pepper plant
the reddish earth used for repairing broken stone and earthenware pots, and it is imported from brqʾ
